character.definition: name of a small principality in what is now Shanxi, the home of the founder of the Zhou dynasty
a girdle; a sash or scarf; a belt; a band; a ribbon; a string; a tie
to look askance, to look; to see, to hope, big eyes
vehicles and garments (commonly used in feudal times to reward vassals), covering on the crossbar at the ends of carriage poles, crank axle of a shade
speaking evil; gobbling sound made by ducks
to hiccough; the humours of the body
